VE.name: V Zone (Velocity, Coastal High Hazard)
VE.description: Coastal zones subject to storm surge with wave action ≥ 3 ft. Homes must be elevated on pilings or columns; no enclosed space below Base Flood Elevation (BFE) except for parking, access, or storage.
VE.insuranceImpact: Most expensive flood zone. Requires special construction. Mandatory for federally-backed mortgages.
VE.buildRules: Docks and seawalls face strict wind + wave design rules. Solid walls below BFE are prohibited.

AE.name: A/AE Zone (Special Flood Hazard)
AE.description: 1% annual chance of flooding (the '100-year' flood zone). BFE is defined. Common along Tampa Bay canals and rivers.
AE.insuranceImpact: Mandatory flood insurance if federally-backed mortgage. Rates vary by BFE compliance.
AE.buildRules: Structures must be at or above BFE. Dock and seawall permitting requires elevation certificates.

X-Shaded.name: X Zone (Shaded / 0.2% Chance)
X-Shaded.description: Areas of 0.2% annual chance flood (the '500-year' floodplain), or 1% chance flood with average depths less than 1 ft.
X-Shaded.insuranceImpact: Flood insurance not mandatory but strongly recommended. Rates are dramatically lower than AE/VE.
X-Shaded.buildRules: No BFE restrictions but still subject to standard county building codes.

X.name: X Zone (Unshaded / Minimal Risk)
X.description: Areas outside the 0.2% annual chance floodplain.
X.insuranceImpact: Flood insurance not required by lenders. Preferred-Risk Policies are cheap ($400–800/yr typical).

33602.notes: Downtown Tampa waterfront. Storm surge history: significant.

33606.notes: Davis Islands / Hyde Park. Mix of AE and VE — waterfront lots often VE.

33611.notes: South Tampa / Ballast Point. Canal-front commonly AE, open Bay-front VE.

33629.notes: Sunset Park / South Tampa. Sinkholes rare; storm surge risk high.

33572.notes: Apollo Beach. Mostly AE canals; VE on open bay.

33573.notes: Sun City Center. Inland — lower flood risk.

33701.notes: Downtown St. Pete. Waterfront blocks are VE; interior AE.

33707.notes: Pass-a-Grille / St. Pete Beach. Open Gulf front is VE.

33711.notes: Gulfport / Boca Ciega Bay. Canal system predominantly AE.

33702.notes: Riviera Bay / Shore Acres. Recurring nuisance flooding, high AE elevations.

33767.notes: Clearwater Beach. Predominantly VE — Gulf-front barrier island.

34216.notes: Anna Maria Island. Almost entirely VE — full Gulf exposure.

34242.notes: Siesta Key. Barrier island — VE predominant.
